prompt:
Using the uploaded image and without changing face, create a cinematic cyberpunk portrait of the subject leaning against a massive glowing LED stock market display in a futuristic financial district at night, wearing clear round glasses and a casual graphic tee, illuminated by vibrant neon cyan, magenta, emerald and orange lights with colorful reflections on the lenses, holographic data streams and digital bokeh surrounding the scene,
shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, soft platinum-blonde hair, high contrast lighting, glossy futuristic atmosphere, premium editorial fashion photography, razor-sharp focus, volumetric lighting, rich color grading, 8K hyper-realistic masterpiece, --ar 2:3 --style raw --v 7 --stylize 100.
promptEn:
Using the uploaded image and without changing face, create a cinematic cyberpunk portrait of the subject leaning against a massive glowing LED stock market display in a futuristic financial district at night, wearing clear round glasses and a casual graphic tee, illuminated by vibrant neon cyan, magenta, emerald and orange lights with colorful reflections on the lenses, holographic data streams and digital bokeh surrounding the scene,
shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, soft platinum-blonde hair, high contrast lighting, glossy futuristic atmosphere, premium editorial fashion photography, razor-sharp focus, volumetric lighting, rich color grading, 8K hyper-realistic masterpiece, --ar 2:3 --style raw --v 7 --stylize 100.
promptZh: 使用上传的图像且保持面部特征不变，创建一个 电影级赛博朋克肖像，描绘主体倚靠在 未来派金融区 夜晚巨大的发光 LED 股票市场显示屏前，佩戴透明圆框眼镜并身着休闲印花 T 恤，被充满活力的霓虹青色、洋红色、祖母绿和橙色灯光照亮，镜片上带有绚丽的反射，全息数据流和数字散景环绕四周，浅景深，超逼真的皮肤纹理，柔软的铂金色头发，高对比度照明，光泽感的未来主义氛围，高级编辑时尚摄影，极其锐利的对焦，体积光，丰富的色彩分级，8K 超写实杰作，--ar 2:3 --style raw --v 7 --stylize 100。
